#  Referências (on-line)


## ggplot2 e dplyr

[ggplot2: elegant graphics for data analysis,  Hadley Wickham](https://ggplot2-book.org/)


[R Programming for Data Science, Roger D. Peng](https://bookdown.org/rdpeng/rprogdatascience/)

[R for Data Science, Hadley Wickham e Garrett Grolemund.](https://r4ds.had.co.nz/)

[R Graphics Cookbook, Winston Chang](https://r-graphics.org/)

## link do dplyr, ggplot2 e magrittr

[dplyr do tidyverse](https://dplyr.tidyverse.org/)

[ggplot2 do tidyverse](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/)

[magrittr do tidyverse?](https://magrittr.tidyverse.org/)
